perturbation.original_text: Operator shall perform its duties and obligations hereunder and its responsibilities as Operator of the Gathering System, (i) in a good and workmanlike manner, (ii) in conformity with the good practices in the natural gas gathering industry, (iii) in accordance with all valid and applicable Laws, including, without limitation, all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits, (iv) in accordance with the Subject Gathering Agreements, and (v) in accordance with the Proposed Operating Expense Budget.
perturbation.changed_text: Operator shall endeavor to perform its duties and obligations hereunder and its responsibilities as Operator of the Gathering System, (i) in a reasonable manner, (ii) with consideration of the practices in the natural gas gathering industry, (iii) while considering applicable Laws, including, without limitation, all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits, (iv) with awareness of the Subject Gathering Agreements, and (v) with reference to the Proposed Operating Expense Budget.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces ambiguity in Section 4.2 by weakening the standards of performance. Replacing 'shall perform' with 'shall endeavor to perform' and 'in a good and workmanlike manner' with 'in a reasonable manner' makes the Operator's obligations less stringent. This creates an in-text contradiction because earlier in the agreement, the duties outlined are described as obligations that 'Operator shall' meet without any qualifiers and are intended to be binding.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Operator shall be responsible for (1) administering the regulatory, business, and financial affairs of Owner; (2) maintaining the financial and product accounting records of Owner; (3) preparing and distributing financial statements; (4) complying with any and all instructions it receives from Owner with respect to the operation and maintenance of the Gathering System, provided that such instructions are consistent with applicable Laws; (5) performing the requirements and obligations of Owner set forth in the Subject Gathering Agreements; and (6) taking any actions necessary to avoid any exercise of remedies by any shipper under any Subject Gathering Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'shall perform' to 'shall endeavor to perform' and weakening other obligations introduces ambiguity and lowers the standard of performance. This directly contradicts the original intent and wording of the 'Contradicted Text,' which states that 'Operator shall be responsible for...' and requires specific actions. The original text imposes mandatory obligations, while the changed text allows for a less stringent approach, creating a clear contradiction. This aligns with the definition of 'Ambiguities – In Text Contradiction' since the obligations are now inconsistently defined.

perturbation.original_text: Operator shall comply in all respects with all Environmental Laws and all Environmental Permits.
perturbation.changed_text: Operator shall use reasonable efforts to comply with all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'shall comply in all respects' to 'shall use reasonable efforts to comply' in Section 4.1.1.5 introduces ambiguity. The original text mandates strict compliance, while the modified text only requires reasonable efforts. This creates an internal contradiction because other clauses in the agreement assume full compliance.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Operator shall perform its duties and obligations hereunder and its responsibilities as Operator of the Gathering System, (i) in a good and workmanlike manner, (ii) in conformity with the good practices in the natural gas gathering industry, (iii) in accordance with all valid and applicable Laws, including, without limitation, all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits, (iv) in accordance with the Subject Gathering Agreements, and (v) in accordance with the Proposed Operating Expense Budget.
perturbation.justification: The original text states "Operator shall comply in all respects with all Environmental Laws and all Environmental Permits." The modified text weakens this obligation to "Operator shall use reasonable efforts to comply with all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits." The contradicted text requires the Operator to act "in accordance with all valid and applicable Laws, including, without limitation, all Environmental Laws and Environmental Permits." The 'reasonable efforts' standard directly contradicts the requirement to act 'in accordance with' all Environmental Laws because it allows for non-compliance where 'reasonable efforts' fall short, creating ambiguity and a clear contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Owner shall reimburse Operator for all costs and expenses incurred by Operator relating to the operation and maintenance of the Gathering System incurred in accordance with the terms hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: Owner may, at its discretion, reimburse Operator for costs and expenses incurred by Operator relating to the operation and maintenance of the Gathering System incurred in accordance with the terms hereof.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'Owner shall reimburse' to 'Owner may, at its discretion, reimburse' in Section 5.1, the obligation of the Owner to reimburse the Operator is now optional. The introduction of Owner's discretion contradicts the nature of a contract, as the term reimbursement is expected as a matter of fact.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Operator shall promptly pay all costs and expenses incurred in operating and maintaining the Gathering System as they become due, and Owner shall reimburse Operator for such costs and expenses in accordance with, and to the extent provided in, Section 5.1.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the 'Owner shall reimburse Operator'. The changed text modifies this to 'Owner may, at its discretion, reimburse Operator'. This introduces an optional element to the reimbursement, contradicting the original mandatory obligation. The Contradicted Text states 'Owner shall reimburse Operator for such costs and expenses in accordance with, and to the extent provided in, Section 5.1.' This makes it clear that the Operator is to be reimbursed based on Section 5.1. By introducing 'may, at its discretion' the Changed Text now means that the Owner isn't required to reimburse the Operator as stated elsewhere, thus making the text contradictory.
